summary: The diff modifies Layout.tsx and LandingPage.tsx to display a logo image, partially satisfying REQ-12. However, both files reference '/assets/Work-Quickie1.png' instead of the required path '/assets/generated/work-quickie-logo.png', and there is no evidence that the image file was added at frontend/public/assets/generated/work-quickie-logo.png. The header logo correctly links to '/' via a Link component, and sizes appear reasonable (h-10 in header, h-20/h-24 in hero). The core AC around the correct file path is not met.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the Work-Quickie logo image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/work-quickie-logo.png
missing_requirements.reason: No file was added at frontend/public/assets/generated/work-quickie-logo.png. The diff shows 0 added files and both Layout.tsx and LandingPage.tsx reference '/assets/Work-Quickie1.png' instead of '/assets/generated/work-quickie-logo.png'.

hallucinated_features.description: Logo image is referenced from '/assets/Work-Quickie1.png' instead of the specified '/assets/generated/work-quickie-logo.png'
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly requires the asset path to be frontend/public/assets/generated/work-quickie-logo.png, but the implementation uses a different, unrequested path '/assets/Work-Quickie1.png'.
